page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion RPG: Decisive Battle in Tokyo-3
text:
Is a RPG game based on Neon Genesis Evangelion TV series published by Fujimi Shobo on 25 March 1996.

This game has a book that contain the rules, character sheets, Angels and the story. 

Contents

Staff

Author: Orange Jelly/Deep Sea Workshop
Cover illustration: Katsuichi Nakayama
Finishing: Atomic
Text illustrations: Hiroki Haritama, Shinobu Hariyama
Publisher: Sato Yoshinosuke
Publisher: Fujimi Shobo
Book Design: DESIGN STUDIO WIDE
